---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

Which operational problem should this solve?

## Proposed Feature

What should AXPA do differently?

## Evidence Sources

Which real evidence should drive the feature?

- SQL DMV / Query Store
- AX DB tables
- AOS counters / Event logs
- Trace Parser / DynamicsPerf
- Existing findings only

## Safety / Compliance Considerations

- Does it remain read-only?
- Does it need approval gates?
- Does it affect GxP/CAB documentation?
- Does it require masking or secret handling?
